description: VERIFIED LIVE: Instagram via content-script DOM extraction. Instagram's API is business-only and it renders nothing logged out — but logged in, every grid page (a profile, Explore, a hashtag) renders post tiles as /p/ and /reel/ links with images, so these tools read them straight from the DOM of your open, logged-in Instagram tab. Navigate the tab to a profile / Explore / hashtag and let it load, then call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on a profile grid: 12 posts with post url, image url and the image's description/caption (alt text) extracted correctly. Requires being logged into Instagram.

tools.name: instagram_grid_posts
tools.description: Post tiles on the current Instagram GRID page — a profile (/<username>/), the Explore page (/explore/), or a hashtag (/explore/tags/<tag>/). Navigate the tab there and let it load first. Returns each post's url (/p/… or /reel/…), image url and the image's description/caption (Instagram's alt text). VERIFIED on a profile (12 posts). Scroll to load more.
